intro: STRUCTURES and general gastroenterology terms used in clinical communication.
reading: The gastrointestinal tract spans from the esophagus to the rectum and includes accessory organs such as the pancreas, gallbladder, and liver. Interpreters working in gastroenterology should be familiar with both organ names and anatomical landmarks, as physicians often refer to quadrants, specific intestinal segments, and ductal structures during consultations.

terms.example_en: The pain was located just above the navel.
The ultrasound showed the spleen was slightly enlarged.
The biopsy was taken from the wall of the colon.
terms.example_ru: Биопсия была взята со стенки толстой кишки.
terms.note: Merged 3 entries; source had typo 'кшика' → corrected to 'кишка'

terms.example_en: The nurse taught him how to care for his stoma.
terms.example_ru: Медсестра научила его ухаживать за стомой.
terms.note: Surgically created opening; see also Stoma Bag under Devices

terms.example_en: The colonoscopy showed mild inflammation in the rectum.
terms.example_ru: Колоноскопия выявила лёгкое воспаление в прямой кишке.

terms.example_en: Most nutrient absorption occurs in the small intestine.
terms.example_ru: Большая часть питательных веществ всасывается в тонкой кишке.

terms.example_en: The bowel sounds were normal on exam.
terms.example_ru: При осмотре перистальтика кишечника была в норме.
terms.note: Merged: 'a bowel', 'bowel', 'Intestine'; 'bowel' is common in clinical speech

terms.example_en: The appendix is a small pouch attached to the large intestine.
terms.example_ru: Аппендикс — небольшой отросток, прикреплённый к толстой кишке.

terms.example_en: The pancreas produces both digestive enzymes and insulin.
terms.example_ru: Поджелудочная железа вырабатывает пищеварительные ферменты и инсулин.

terms.example_en: A stone was blocking the bile duct.
The pancreatic duct appeared dilated on the MRI.
terms.example_ru: На МРТ панкреатический проток выглядел расширенным.
terms.note: Source typo: 'pacncreatic duct' — corrected; also called duct of Wirsung

terms.example_en: The digestive system breaks down food and absorbs nutrients.
terms.example_ru: Пищеварительная система расщепляет пищу и всасывает питательные вещества.

terms.example_en: The pain is localized in the right lower quadrant.
terms.example_ru: Боль локализована в правом нижнем квадранте.

terms.example_en: Food passes from the mouth through the esophagus to the stomach.
terms.example_ru: Пища проходит через пищевод из полости рта в желудок.

terms.example_en: A polyp was found in the sigmoid colon during colonoscopy.
terms.example_ru: При колоноскопии в сигмовидной кишке обнаружили полип.

terms.example_en: Imaging showed thickening of the walls of the colon.
terms.example_ru: На снимках выявлено утолщение стенок толстой кишки.

terms.example_en: Antibiotics can disrupt the gut bacteria.
